questions.q: Which of the following is NOT among the new features being added to Crimson Desert in upcoming updates?
options: New Skills for Damiane and Oongka
questions.correctText: While Crimson Desert is receiving updates like Boss Rematches, new skills, and difficulty settings, player housing customization has not been announced as part of these upcoming features.

questions.q: According to some accounts, which magazine, known for its adult content, also published significant literary works and well-paid short stories, contributing to literacy for some readers?
questions.correctText: Playboy magazine, despite its reputation, published significant literary works, including short stories that paid very well, and is credited by some with fostering literacy.

questions.q: Recent news suggests a new vaccine could curb infections of which tick-borne disease that is spreading?
What significant historical event occurred on April 10, 2026, involving LeBron James and his son Bronny in an NBA game?
options: Bronny James assisted LeBron James for a dunk, marking the first son-to-father assist in NBA history.
LeBron James assisted Bronny James for a three-pointer, marking the first father-to-son assist in NBA history.
Both Bronny and LeBron James recorded triple-doubles in the same game.
They became the first father-son duo to start an NBA game together.
questions.correctText: Bronny James assisted LeBron James for a dunk, marking the first son-to-father assist in NBA history.

questions.q: Which Denuvo-protected game released in 2026 was reportedly the first to be fully cracked by pirates?
questions.correctText: Resident Evil Requiem, a title released in 2026, has been reported as the first Denuvo-protected game of that year to be fully cracked by pirates.

questions.q: Which author, known for psychological thrillers like 'The Housemaid', recently revealed their real name is Sara Cohen and that they are also a doctor?
questions.correctText: Freida McFadden is the pen name of Sara Cohen, a doctor who writes bestselling thrillers like 'The Housemaid'.

questions.q: FIFA has faced criticism regarding the 2026 World Cup ticketing for allegedly introducing what?
options: A new category of significantly higher-priced pitch-side tickets after initial sales.
A lottery system for all ticket purchases.
Restrictions on the number of tickets fans can buy per match.
A complete ban on resale tickets.
questions.correctText: A new category of significantly higher-priced pitch-side tickets after initial sales.

questions.q: What is the release date for the horror film 'The Yeti' in the United States?
questions.correctText: The film 'The Yeti' was released in the United States on April 10, 2026.

questions.q: Which author declined the $175,000 Windham-Campbell Prize due to promotional requirements?
questions.correctText: Helen DeWitt turned down the $175,000 Windham-Campbell Prize because she was unable to fulfill the required promotional activities.

questions.q: What type of weather was forecast for the AFL Gather Round matches in Adelaide on April 10, 2026?
